div1.entryFree:
Coming-on, 1) adj., complaisant: now I will be your Rosalind in a more c. disposition, As IV, 1, 113.
2) subst. a) advancing, making an attack: the men do sympathise with the mastiffs in robustious and rough c. H5 III, 7, 159. -- b) futurity: referred me to the c. of time, Mcb. I, 5, 9.
